purpose: Phase 10 Reader Path / Sales Ladder Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data turns the archive into clear reading paths, book ladders, free gateways, and conversion routes.
rules: Every reader path starts with a clear problem.
Every path includes a free gateway, a trust route, a map route, and a book route.
Do not make fake income promises, fake scarcity, or unverifiable guarantees.
Hardback, paperback, ebook, KU, and free routes should be separated by reader intent.
Each path should move from orientation to evidence to deep-dive books.
The archive should sell by clarity, not confusion.

paths.title: D.O.G / Occult Architecture Path
paths.readerProblem: I want the symbolic and esoteric master key behind the whole Matrix Reprogrammed world.
ladder: Start with the Black File
Open the symbolic power map
Read SYMBOL
Move into D.O.G The Architect
Use the Masonic degree books as deep-reference branches

paths.title: Intelligence Dossiers Path
paths.readerProblem: I want the public-record map of agencies, surveillance, covert history, oversight, and deep-state language.
ladder: Start with the Deep State answer page
Open the Intelligence Network map
Read CIA first
Move through NSA, GCHQ, MI6
Use Elite Toolkit as the connecting super-book

paths.title: Crime-State Overlap Path
paths.readerProblem: I want to understand cartels, mafia systems, underground banking, ports, sanctions, court records, and corruption overlap.
ladder: Start with the Crime-State Overlap map
Read the Court Records lane
Open Cartels
Move into Albanian Mafia and ’Ndrangheta
Use Triad and Power Overlap as financial-system branches

paths.title: War / Contractors Path
paths.readerProblem: I want to trace war budgets, contractors, intelligence claims, procurement, sanctions, and human cost.
ladder: Start with the War Machine map
Open the association boundary
Read Blackwater
Move into WWIII
Return to CIA and Elite Toolkit for structure

paths.title: Mind Control / Psychology Path
paths.readerProblem: I want the personal-control side: manipulation, identity, narcissism, attention, media, and behavioral influence.
ladder: Start with MKUltra as the documented historical anchor
Move into identity and manipulation books
Use dark psychology books as practical recognition tools
Return to Trust Center to keep claims disciplined

paths.title: Evidence / Trust Path
paths.readerProblem: I want to learn how to read dark claims without being fooled by viral overclaiming.
ladder: Start with the Trust Center
Read claim labels and source methodology
Open the Evidence Vault
Use Black File as the master orientation
Move into Elite Toolkit and Power Overlap

paths.title: Survival / War Path
paths.readerProblem: I want practical survival, crisis, war, disruption, and personal resilience routes.
ladder: Start with Timers and Human Cost dashboards
Use Intel Weekly for current routes
Read Keep Calm

Use WWIII as the macro-risk branch
